meta.name: Shivam Sharma
meta.title: Building cloud-native systems & scalable backends
meta.bio: 3+ years designing CI/CD pipelines, containerised deployments, and cloud infrastructure on AWS and GCP. Pivoting into DevOps / Platform Engineering with a focus on automation, observability, and developer experience.
meta.contact_tagline: Open to DevOps, Platform Engineering & Backend roles.

personal.name: ADB-logger
personal.desc: High-performance desktop app to parse and visualise Android Debug Bridge logs, built with Rust and Tauri.

personal.name: Commute Crew
personal.desc: Custom carpooling platform with REST APIs and geolocation to maximise successful matches and reduce fuel consumption.

personal.name: Auto Email Reply
personal.desc: Intelligent automated email reply system using OAuth2, saving 10+ hours of manual work per week.

personal.name: Spotify Playlist Importer
personal.desc: Secure utility that seamlessly migrates any Spotify playlist to YouTube, eliminating platform lock-in.

professional.name: GenAI Support Chatbot
professional.desc: LangChain + Pinecone powered chatbot delivering contextual responses, reducing manual support interactions by ~30%. Slack integration for real-time DB updates.

professional.name: CI/CD Pipeline Optimisation
professional.desc: Redesigned GitHub Actions / Bitbucket Pipelines with strategic caching, cutting build times 40% with zero-downtime deployments.

professional.name: Shaivam — Devotional App
professional.desc: React Native app with custom SQLite music player, handling 1M+ concurrent requests during Maha Shivaratri. Google Maps temple itinerary module.

professional.name: Hospital Management System
professional.desc: Comprehensive HMS digitising hospital records, enabling real-time remote access for patient monitoring and document management.

bullets: Designed and optimised CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions / Bitbucket Pipelines with strategic caching, reducing build times by 40% and enabling zero-downtime deployments.
Built a GenAI chatbot with LangChain and Pinecone for accurate contextual responses, cutting manual support interactions by ~30%.
Integrated Slack API to monitor real-time user activity and push vector DB updates directly from Slack.
Architected scalable backend workflows on GCP (Cloud Functions, Cloud Storage, Monitoring) and Firebase.
Developed a cross-platform mobile app using React Native and TypeScript.
Engineered the Shaivam React Native app with a custom SQLite music player, handling 1M+ concurrent requests at peak Maha Shivaratri.
Integrated Google Maps module for devotees to plan temple itineraries across India.
Built a comprehensive Hospital Management System to digitise records and enable remote patient monitoring.
